title: adhatoda trinervia
intro: Adhatoda trinervia, also known as Neem tree or Vasa, is a tropical evergreen plant native to India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda trinervia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Adhatoda trinervia can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
